'''lazhutu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:cecidiologist|cecidiologist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cecidiologist|cecidiologist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazhutu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzhitith|læzhitith]] || [[word:læzhitij|læzhitij]] || [[word:læzhitish|læzhitish]] || [[word:læzhiti|læzhiti]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazhuzhututh|lazhuzhututh]] || [[word:lazhuzhutuj|lazhuzhutuj]] || [[word:lazhuzhutush|lazhuzhutush]] || [[word:lazhuzhutu|lazhuzhutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazhututh|lazhututh]] || [[word:lazhutuj|lazhutuj]] || [[word:lazhutush|lazhutush]] || [[word:lazhutu|lazhutu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazhuftuth|lazhuftuth]] || [[word:lazhuftuj|lazhuftuj]] || [[word:lazhuftush|lazhuftush]] || [[word:lazhuftuf|lazhuftuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazhututhu|lazhututhu]] || [[word:lazhutuju|lazhutuju]] || [[word:lazhutushu|lazhutushu]] || [[word:lazhutuku|lazhutuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazhututh|lazhututh]] || [[word:lazhutuj|lazhutuj]] || [[word:lazhutush|lazhutush]] || [[word:lazhutu|lazhutu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazhututhul|lazhututhul]] || [[word:lazhutujul|lazhutujul]] || [[word:lazhutushul|lazhutushul]] || [[word:lazhutukul|lazhutukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazhututhuthu|lazhututhuthu]] || [[word:lazhutujuju|lazhutujuju]] || [[word:lazhutushushu|lazhutushushu]] || [[word:lazhutuku|lazhutuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazhututhun|lazhututhun]] || [[word:lazhutujun|lazhutujun]] || [[word:lazhutushun|lazhutushun]] || [[word:lazhutukun|lazhutukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazhututhuoro|lazhututhuoro]] || [[word:lazhutujuoro|lazhutujuoro]] || [[word:lazhutushuoro|lazhutushuoro]] || [[word:lazhutukuoro|lazhutukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
